name: web_search
description: Performs a general-purpose web search and returns a ranked list of relevant results with snippets.

num_results.description: Number of results to return (1–10). Defaults to 5.

safe_search.description: Whether to apply safe search filtering. Defaults to true.

region.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to localise results, e.g. 'US', 'ES'. Defaults to 'US'.
